name: Special K's Transport
recent_news: No M&A or growth news identified; long-standing small wheelchair transport provider in Cedar Rapids area listed by City of Cedar Rapids as an ADA paratransit option.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Micro wheelchair/paratransit operator (3 employees, ~$182K revenue) with no evidence of school district contracts or yellow-bus fleet. Below Summit tuck-in scale; no operating leverage.

name: Incare Transpor
districts_or_customers: NEMT/Medicaid-style clients in Knox County area
recent_news: NPI registered May 2012 as a Non-Emergency Medical Transport (van) provider; no M&A activity identified. Listed as a handicapped transport provider in Knoxville.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Micro NEMT van operator (~3-9 employees, <$500K revenue) registered as medical transport, not a school-bus contractor. No identified school district contracts; sub-scale for Summit tuck-in.
